## Type of change

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, show before/after. -->

## Privacy checklist (required)

- [ ] No analytics, tracking, ads, or cloud AI added
- [ ] No Google Play Services dependency added
- [ ] No new permissions added (or: new permission is justified and opt-in)
- [ ] No new network access added (or: justified and opt-in)

## Quality checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug` passes
- [ ] `./gradlew :app:lintDebug` passes
- [ ] Reused existing components/tokens where possible (no hardcoded styles)
- [ ] Changes feel native to Page's calm, text-first, monochrome design
